Services
We run your
B2B outreach.

Email Campaigns

Who We Serve
If you sell B2B,
we can open the door.

Three distinct segments. One focused approach for each.

Mid-Market

Mid-Market B2B

Building a pipeline of high-value business relationships, without relying on referrals.

3 months to start
A relationship-first approach that fits businesses where trust matters more than pitch. Our human-written outreach sounds like a partner, not a vendor.
Enterprise

S&M Tech Enterprise

Scaling your pipeline without scaling your headcount.

6-month minimum
Prolead operates as a precision outbound layer that scales where your team can't. We don't replace your sales org - we make it punch above its weight.
Startups

Growing Startups

Their first sales team and their first investor introduction - without the first hire.

3-month entry
Need traction fast. No time to build outbound from scratch. We plug in immediately - plus, when you're ready to raise, we open those doors too.
What You Get
The precision of a specialist.
The scale of a machine.
You get the output of a full outbound team -
without the overhead of building one.
01 · Targeting

Precision targeting

Every contact researched and verified. No lists, no wide spray, no wasted budget.

02 · Outreach

Human tone, AI scale

Real writers craft every sequence. AI delivers at a volume no human team could match.

03 · Measurement

Pipeline, not leads

We measure success in booked meetings - not open rates, not impressions.

04 · Speed

No team to hire

Skip recruiters, onboarding, ramp time, and turnover. Your outbound starts faster than expected.

05 · Channels

Email + LinkedIn

Multi-channel sequences that reach decision-makers where they actually respond.

06 · Learning

Continuous optimization

Every campaign improves. Our AI learns from reply patterns to sharpen what works.

How It Works
One pipeline. Five stages.

We handle every step of your outbound - from finding the right people to starting the right conversation.

01

ICP Definition

We map your ideal customer profile, segment by segment, with your input and our data.

02

Lead Research

AI agents surface verified, enriched contacts. No guesswork, no bad data.

03

Copy & Sequences

Experienced outreach writers craft messaging that sounds human - because it is.

04

Launch & Optimise

Campaigns go live across email and LinkedIn with continuous A/B and reply-rate tuning.

05

Qualified Meetings

Warm responses land in your calendar. You focus on the conversation - we start it.

Why Prolead
One approach.
Perfected.

Great outreach needs both precision and scale.
We've spent years on the frontlines of tech and startup sales,
and that experience is built into every campaign.

Experience

Built by professionals who know exactly what a great first message looks like - and how to make every conversation start strong.

Technology

Our AI agents were designed specifically for B2B outreach - not adapted from generic tools.

Focus

Email + LinkedIn only. One product. We've learned from experience - this is what works. No distractions.
